safetyNotes: Beta-asarone exposure and product variability are recurring safety concerns in modern reviews., Use should be framed cautiously because toxicology risk can vary by chemotype and preparation.

sources.title: NCBI Taxonomy: acorus calamus var. angustatus (TaxID 325552)

description: Acorus calamus var. angustatus is a calamus chemotype discussed in phytochemistry literature for asarone-rich composition and toxicology concerns.
dosage: No validated therapeutic dose range was established in the promoted source; dosing remains formulation-dependent and uncertain.
